chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5383 of 2017 C.P. No. D-5384 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge C.P. No. D-5383 of 2017 1. For hearing of CMA No. 19311/2020 2. For hearing of main case C.P. No. D-5384 of 2017 2. For hearing of main case 21-02-2025 Ms. Dil Khurram Shaheen Advocate for Petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Saleh Muhammad files vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent which is taken on record in CP No. D-5384 of 2017. It is jointly stated that the subject matter is pending before two references being SCRA No. 510/2020 and 511/2020. It is stated that it may be just and proper to dispose of these petitions and the fate of any amount secured would be subject to the aforesaid Reference Applications. Order accordingly. Office to place copy of this order in connected file. Judge Judge Amjad PS
